name: pixel-squad
description: Multi-agent orchestrating pixel factory — dual-provider (Copilot + Claude) inside VS Code.

commands.title: Pixel Squad: Open in Editor Panel
Pixel Squad: Spawn Agent in Room
Pixel Squad: Assign Task to Agent

pixelSquad.autoExecute.description: Automatically execute tasks with GitHub Copilot after routing them through the squad.  Enable for Copilot-agent-style behaviour (execute and apply changes immediately). Disable to review before applying.

enumDescriptions: Use GitHub Copilot language models for planning and execution.
Use Claude language models (requires Anthropic extension or Claude Code).
pixelSquad.modelFamily.description: Preferred language model family for planning and task execution.

pixelSquad.autoPopulateWorkspaceContext.description: Automatically capture active editor content, open files, git changes, and relevant workspace files when creating or assigning a task.

pixelSquad.workspaceContextMaxFiles.description: Maximum number of workspace files to auto-include as task context during planning and execution.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Pixel Squad
walkthroughs.description: Learn how to route tasks through your multi-agent factory powered by GitHub Copilot.

steps.title: Open the Agent Factory
steps.description:
Open the Pixel Squad panel to see your rooms, agents, and task wall.

[Open Agent Factory](command:pixelSquad.showFactory)

steps.title: Route Your First Task
steps.description:
Use the command palette or the panel composer to describe a task. Pixel Squad will plan it with GitHub Copilot and assign agents.

[Create a Task](command:pixelSquad.createTask)

steps.title: Chat with @pixel-squad
steps.description: Type `@pixel-squad` in GitHub Copilot Chat to route tasks conversationally. The squad updates the factory panel in real time.

steps.title: Execute and Review Tasks
steps.description: Click Execute on any queued task to have an agent work on it using GitHub Copilot. Review the output and approve or retry.

steps.title: Run the Smoke Test
steps.description:
Verify everything works end-to-end with a single command.

[Run Smoke Test](command:pixelSquad.runSmokeTest)

chatParticipants.name: pixel-squad
chatParticipants.description: Route a task through Pixel Squad (Copilot + Claude) and update the Agent Factory.

commands.name: route
commands.description: Route a task through the squad and update the factory.

scripts.build: npm run build:webview && npm run build:extension
scripts.package:vsix: npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce package --out pixel-squad.vsix
